tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def open-prs (github_pull_requests {:state "open"}))

(let [total (count open-prs)
      by-repo (frequencies (map :repo open-prs))
      top-repo (apply max-key val by-repo)]
  {:total-open total
   :top-repo (first top-repo)
   :top-repo-count (second top-repo)
   :all-repos (sort-by val > by-repo)})"}

tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(let [open-prs (github_pull_requests {:state "open"})
      total (count open-prs)
      by-repo (frequencies (map :repo open-prs))
      top-entry (apply max-key val by-repo)
      top-repo (key top-entry)
      top-count (val top-entry)]
  {:total-open total
   :top-repo top-repo
   :top-repo-count top-count
   :all-repos (sort-by val > by-repo)})"}
